title: A Transparent Pipeline for Online Sexism Detection Based on the Combination of Explainable Artificial Intelligence, Feature Selection, and Ensemble Learning
description: Code, models, and analysis notebooks for the BERT-plus-SHAP pipeline that classifies sexist text on social-media benchmarks (EXIST 2024) while exposing the lexical and contextual cues behind each prediction. Archived snapshot for the v1.0-thesis release accompanying the doctoral thesis Let Me Explain! Explainable NLP for Understanding Large Language Models (Utrecht University, 2026).
